business_ideas.idea: Tiger21-style paid investing mastermind for younger people with ~$1M investable assets, run off the podcast audience.
Paid community for nurses (large, underappreciated, us-vs-them demographic; employers might pay).
Turn a big nurse Instagram community into a job board plus brand equity deals (next Incredible Health).
Paid community for Google Sheets / spreadsheet power users, priced cheap.
Vetted senior-engineer community sharing advanced scaling knowledge not findable online.
Community of professional designers at top companies sharing tools, salaries, and job opportunities.
Club LTV: free gated community of $100k+/mo e-commerce store owners monetized via sponsors like Mercury.
Deep Sentinel: AI-plus-remote-guard home/business security at $100/month (human-in-the-loop 'super services').
Extend remote-guard model to construction yards, car lots, hotels, apartment greeters, and elderly check-ins.
Digitize physical cash movement to eliminate armored-transport risk (cash logistics still $100M/yr businesses).

predictions.text: The Nurse Life RN Instagram owner could turn his 1.2M-follower page into a $100M company within 10 years.
A paid community is currently the fastest path to a $10k/month side-hustle income for most listeners.
